sql_array: CREATE TABLE http_mapping (vdir VARCHAR(255), directory VARCHAR(255), www_host VARCHAR(255), host VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO http_mapping (vdir, directory, www_host, host) VALUES ('/vdir', '/admin/', 'www.foo.com', 'host.foo.com');
UPDATE http_mapping SET directory = '/updated_dir/' WHERE vdir = '/vdir';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM http_mapping WHERE host = 'host.foo.com';
